note: Valid: BuildDryRunPlan (internal/agents/dryrun.go) records the CLI descriptor command while the default ACP transport (internal/app/app.go acpTransportEnabled) launches the npx ACP adapter (internal/agents/acp_transport.go acpAdapterCommand). Reworded the SECURITY.md 'Plan before running' bullet to say the plan surfaces the prompt, boundary checks, and resolved agent, and that the recorded command is the CLI-transport invocation while the default ACP transport launches the external npx ACP adapter instead. Applied the same correction to docs/agents.md 'Execute: plan vs run', which made the identical 'exact command' claim, to keep the docs consistent as the contract requires.

Added 'Control the external tooling', 'review, pin, or otherwise control', and 'restricted or high-sensitivity' to requiredSecurityPolicyMentions in internal/docs/docs_test.go, pinning the safe-usage guidance to review/pin/control external ACP/CLI tooling in restricted environments. Used 'restricted or high-sensitivity' rather than the full phrase because 'high-sensitivity environments' wraps across a line break in SECURITY.md and a substring assertion cannot match it. go test ./internal/docs and make check pass.
